canonical_definition: A dialogue dataset (Dinan et al., 2019) where one conversational partner has access to Wikipedia knowledge, used for training dialogue models.
papers: Model Merging by Uncertainty-Based Gradient Matching

definitions.text: A dialogue dataset (Dinan et al., 2019) where one conversational partner has access to Wikipedia knowledge, used for training dialogue models.
definitions.paper: Model Merging by Uncertainty-Based Gradient Matching

definitions.text: A dataset for open-domain dialogue where one participant, the "wizard," has access to Wikipedia to inform their conversation, testing knowledge-grounded dialogue.

relationships.paper: Model Merging by Uncertainty-Based Gradient Matching
relationships.evidence: train a dialogue model on Wizard-of-Wikipedia (Dinan et al., 2019) which we then train further on synthetic data containing hallucinations
